channel.description: Recent content in System Design Interview Prep on simeononsecurity

item.title: System Design for Software Engineers: Concepts, Patterns, and Interview Prep
item.category: "system design for software engineers" , "system design interview prep" , "distributed systems concepts" , "software architecture patterns" , "how to study system design" , "system design guide" , "CAP theorem" , "load balancing" , "caching" , "growing as a developer"
item.description: Learn the distributed systems concepts, architecture patterns, and study strategies needed to master system design as a software engineer and ace system design interviews.
